commit.message:
[FLINK-24689][runtime-web] Add log's last modified time in log list view

This closes #17698.

verification.payload:
tree ef0f367ccf882e1715177486fd9f37248e60e1b1
parent e40b4b7626556bf5026ccb2a318de653b2981e75
author ysymi <ff.2011@live.cn> 1636030719 +0800
committer Till Rohrmann <trohrmann@apache.org> 1637000678 +0100

[FLINK-24689][runtime-web] Add log's last modified time in log list view

This closes #17698.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@

+
+export interface JobManagerLogItemInterface {
+  name: string;
+  size: number;
+  mtime: number;
+}

@@ -32,7 +32,8 @@ Log Name - Size (KB) + Last Modified Time + Size (KB) @@ -42,6 +43,7 @@ {{ narrowData.name }} + {{ narrowData.mtime | humanizeDate: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' }} {{ narrowData.size / 1024 | number: '1.0-2' }}

@@ -31,7 +31,8 @@ Log Name - Size (KB) + Last Modified Time + Size (KB) @@ -41,6 +42,7 @@ {{ narrowData.name }} + {{ narrowData.mtime | humanizeDate: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' }} {{ narrowData.size / 1024 | number: '1.0-2' }}
